research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://takachiho-soft.co.jp/ accessible. Founded 1984. Capital: 10M JPY. Revenue: 675M JPY (2024). 70 employees. President: 富田睦薫. SES and system development/operations. Strong Hitachi group relationships. Privacy Mark certified. KIA member.
